items.title: Sealed Super Mario Bros. sells for a record $3 million
items.summary: A copy of Super Mario Bros., still in the box and sealed with its original sticker, just sold at Heritage Auctions for $3 million. That absolutely crushes the previous record of...

items.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
items.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.
